steps.title: Find the interval bounds
steps.content:
Use the estimate $31.4$ and the margin of error $0.23$ to find the lower and upper plausible values for the population average.
$$31.4-0.23=31.17$$
$$31.4+0.23=31.63$$

steps.title: Interpret the interval
steps.content: The margin of error gives an interval centered at the sample estimate. Therefore, plausible values for the average weight of all boxes filled by the company are between $31.17$ and $31.63$ pounds. The answer is A.
